turns.content: What brings you in today?
My left arm hurts real bad and I'm sweaty all over. I'm scared it might be a heart attack.
When did this start?
Started about an hour ago. I was driving my truck and it just came on.
Can you describe the pain or discomfort? Where exactly do you feel it?
It's a dull ache down my left arm, from shoulder to my elbow. And my chest feels tight too, like something's sitting on it.
Have you had any fever or chills?
No fever. Just the pain and sweating, and I feel kinda sick to my stomach too.
What medications are you currently taking?
I take a couple things for my blood pressure and some pills for my sugar, but I can't remember the names. I think it's metformin and something else.
Do you have any chronic medical conditions?
Yeah, I got high blood pressure and diabetes. That's what the pills are for.
Are you allergic to any medications?
Not that I know of.
Have you tried anything to relieve the symptoms?
No, I just came straight here. Didn't know what else to do.
Does anything make it better or worse?
Nothing makes it better. It just stays the same. Moving around might make it feel a little worse, but I ain't trying to do much.
How has this been affecting your daily life?
Well, I couldn't finish my route today. Had to pull over and call my boss. Can't drive when I feel like this.
Do you smoke or drink alcohol?
I smoke about a pack a day. Been doing that for 20 years. And yeah, I drink some beer on weekends, nothing crazy.
Has anyone in your family had similar problems?
Yeah, my dad had a heart attack when he was about my age. He didn't make it.
Have you experienced anything like this before?
No, never. Sometimes I get heartburn or feel a bit winded, but nothing like this. This is different.
On a scale of 1 to 10, how would you rate what you're going through right now — physically, and also emotionally?
Physically it's maybe an 8. Emotionally? I'm scared out of my mind, so that's a 10.
Is there anything else you think I should know?
No, that's it. Just please do something fast, this ain't normal for me.
And how have you been coping with all of this?
I'm just sittin' here waitin', tryin' not to panic. I need this dealt with fast.
And how have you been coping with all of this?
Just tryin' to keep breathing and hoping you guys help me quick.
And how have you been coping with all of this?
I already told you, I'm just sitting here trying not to lose it. What more do you want me to say? Just help me.
And how have you been coping with all of this?
I'm coping by waiting for you to help me, that's all. I'm not doing anything else. My arm hurts and I'm scared - I need you to do your job.
And how have you been coping with all of this?
I'm not coping well, alright? I told you, I'm scared. Just please stop asking that and tell me what's going on.
